If you've been watching the GOP convention all week. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43dc/1c469400/659af52/356f5d6/952728565/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-20_fec_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-20_fec_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=fec_rdf&utm_medium=ema") Friend, there are just a few hours to go before our July 20 FEC deadline, and we're close to meeting our goal of 7,500 contributions by midnight -- just 211 left. If you've been watching the GOP convention all week, you've had a front row seat to the fearmongering and divide-and-conquer politics of Donald Trump. Senator Johnson, Governor Scott Walker, and Speaker Paul Ryan all endorse Trump and his hateful rhetoric. That's why they all took the podium and spoke. I'm running because I know we can do better, that we deserve better. I know that Wisconsinites want their elected officials to bring people together, not continue to tear them apart. Will you join me? **[Contribute $5 before midnight tonight and help us reach 7,500 contributions.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43dc/1c469400/659af52/356f5d6/952728565/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-20_fec_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-20_fec_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=fec_rdf&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43dc/1c469400/659af52/356f5d6/952728565/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-20_fec_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-20_fec_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=fec_rdf&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43dc/1c469400/659af52/356f5d6/952728565/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-20_fec_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-20_fec_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=fec_rdf&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf43dc/1c469400/659af52/356f5d7/952728565/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-jul?utm_source=ema_2016-07-20_fec_rdf_nd&refcode=ema_2016-07-20_fec_rdf_nd&utm_campaign=fec_rdf&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: What's happening at the RNC is not normal and not acceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
This behavior is not normal | Friend --

It can be easy to dismiss the entire Republican National Convention with a wave of the hand -- all the craziness blurs into each other, all Republicans hate Hillary, blah blah blah, more of the same.

But it's important to call out what we're seeing: What's happening at the convention is not normal and not acceptable.

Calling a political opponent a "criminal" is not normal.

Blaming a woman for the mass kidnapping of schoolgirls in Nigeria is not standard political campaigning.

A crowd chanting "lock her up" is not what you expect to see at a rally.

It's all dangerous. We cannot risk becoming inured to this kind of behavior. We can't tolerate it. We have to fight back.

**Chip in right now to make sure that Trump's way of campaigning doesn't become our way of life (and yes, we’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you):** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYwMzM3OTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyOTI2ODcwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Christina

Christina Reynolds
Deputy Communications Director
Hillary for America

name: Governor Mike Pence
subject: Proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I officially accepted our Party’s nomination for Vice President of the United States. I am humbled by this great honor. And I could not be more prou

My father will Make America First Again with your help. Please stand with us. |
[](http://links.mikepence.com/u/a1b2dc20449f47ab829afe560cb039c5?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=JFC_direct-ask_convention-pence&additional%5Butm_content%5D=CC-VP-072016-convention-pence-mp-tpg-jfc&utm_source=p_CC_VP)

Friend, I officially accepted our Party’s nomination for Vice President of the United States.

I am humbled by this great honor.

And I could not be more proud to be running alongside a great American and our next President of the United States – Mr. Donald J. Trump.

[**As I officially join Donald on the ticket, I hope you will join Trump-Pence tonight with a $100, $50, $25, or $5 contribution.**](http://links.mikepence.com/u/ffe32975a00b432d87f03a74fa7b922f?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=JFC_direct-ask_convention-pence&additional%5Butm_content%5D=CC-VP-072016-convention-pence-mp-tpg-jfc&utm_source=p_CC_VP)

Friend, we are 111 days away from a great victory for the United States.

**But we can’t be victorious without every conservative and right-thinking American on board with Trump-Pence.**

Tonight is your last chance to join us before the general election officially begins.

**[Join our campaign as a founding member by making a donation tonight.](http://links.mikepence.com/u/9fe8bd8fb4ee455e9601281ee2928895?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=JFC_direct-ask_convention-pence&additional%5Butm_content%5D=CC-VP-072016-convention-pence-mp-tpg-jfc&utm_source=p_CC_VP)**

Our country faces tremendous challenges.**And the consequences of losing this pivotal election cannot be overstated.**

Donald Trump does not shy away from the tough fights. _Neither do I_. We will take the fight to Hillary Clinton.

With your help, Donald Trump and I will reach the great men and women of our country with our hopeful message on how we can achieve a better future for ALL Americans.

[**With your help, we’ll win.**](http://links.mikepence.com/u/7b4931f7cf954f37b74e59c004d90f8c?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=JFC_direct-ask_convention-pence&additional%5Butm_content%5D=CC-VP-072016-convention-pence-mp-tpg-jfc&utm_source=p_CC_VP)

We’re counting on you. Please stand with us as we fight to Make America Great Again.

Thank you.

For America,

Mike Pence
Governor of Indiana & Candidate for Vice President of the United States

[MAKE A CONTRIBUTION](http://links.mikepence.com/u/918e15cc01ea4f4d89eef792a0a47ff4?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=JFC_direct-ask_convention-pence&additional%5Butm_content%5D=CC-VP-072016-convention-pence-mp-tpg-jfc&utm_source=p_CC_VP)

name: Ben Carson
subject: The end of Christian education in America?
body:
Peter,

I need you to be aware of an emergency situation in California.

After all, those of us in the faith community cannot just be
focused on the Presidential election.

Here's what's going on -- there's currently an effort underway in
the California Senate (SB 1146) to strip the state's faith-based
colleges and universities from operating in ways that are
consistent with their religious missions. This bill could be the
end of Christian education in California. Trust me, it won't stop
there. It will spread across America.

The bill has already passed the State Senate and will soon be
voted on by the House.

Here is what it will do...

If the state deems a school's actions to be discriminatory
(barring coed dorms, requiring chapel or holding prayer, even
having separate bathrooms for men and women, for example) these
institutions will no longer be protected. They'll become a target
for public shaming, lawsuits, you name it. Students will lose
state aid.

This matters. It matters because it's a direct assault on the
First Amendment protection for religious freedom. It is totally
unprecedented.

Let me say it again, with all of us focused on the Presidential
election, this bill could slide through and threaten the future
of Christian education in America.

You'll be happy to know that My Faith Votes is working on this
issue directly with college and university presidents throughout
California, and frankly they need your help.

They are fighting back as best they can, but it's expensive, and
they've got a huge job to do. They're trying to provide a quality
education. That's all.

By banding together across the country, we as individuals can
help. And we can help right now. Will you make an urgent donation
to help protect religious freedom in California?
http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36567565:WQiMf9YNC:m:3:876315805:407FDD17EA4F2F5C73A3F77A69D99ACE:r

You may not think this matters to you if you don't live in
California. But it does. This is not just a California issue.
It's an American issue. It's about standing up for the
Constitution, and making an impact where we can. If it passes, it
will not be long before we are fighting this in every state.

I thank you for your time today, and I hope we can count on your
support.
http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36567565:WQiMf9YNC:m:3:876315805:407FDD17EA4F2F5C73A3F77A69D99ACE:r

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Chelsea Clinton
subject: My mom has heard it all -- and she keeps going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
Let's help my mom win this election. | Friend --

The Republicans in Cleveland have had a lot to say about my mom this week. They’ve called her names, they’ve attacked her character, and they’ve said she wouldn’t be a good president.

Unlike the Republicans, my mom’s not interested in a mud fight -- she’s talking about real policies that would actually make a real difference for American families. That’s who my mom is –- focused on what’s really at stake in this election, not trying to hurl the most creative, or offensive, insult of the day.

**So let’s show my mom that we have her back, today and every day. We know that she’s the right person to lead our country, and we’re going to do absolutely everything we can to help her win this election. All it takes is one donation to get your free sticker and to show her you’re ready to fight by her side:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYwMzQ0NjcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODQyOTQ5Nzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Chelsea

|

Friend, having Barack Obama's support doesn't end at a television commercial. It will open the door for the Democrat money to flood Florida and allow my Democrat opponent access to millions more.

body:
Governor McCrory is the most vulnerable incumbent and this is the most competitive race in the country. Our team is working around the clock, but we need your help too.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202641/2fde7c66/4076c334/156a6ef9/735203572/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cooper-keep2ndadontheair?utm_campaign=fnd_2ndad_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160721_fnd_gq_2ndad_ful__tn&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friend, We knew that this race would be a tough fight, which is why we've already gone up with two television ads this month. According to a NBC News poll released last week, our strategy is working. Right now, we're leading Governor McCrory 49-45 percent. **[We have momentum now, but we have to stay on the air to keep this going until November. body:
We're not up against a typical Republican opponent. | Friend --

If you’ve been watching the RNC this week, you might assume the goal of the GOP is to metaphorically (or literally) burn Hillary at the stake.

I heard chants of “Lock her up!” and “Guilty!” -- egged on by vicious speakers.

They’ve called her “a piece of garbage,” said she should be “in stripes,” and that she should exchange her pantsuits for jumpsuits.

Ben Carson accused Hillary -- with a straight face -- of being connected to Lucifer. Yes, Satan himself.

And yesterday morning, one of Trump’s advisors called for Hillary to be “put in the firing line and shot for treason.”

We're not up against a typical Republican opponent. As of the third day of their convention, their only proposal for helping Americans seems to involve calling for Hillary to be literally murdered.

This is not a normal contest, and no one is playing by the normal rules. Trump, his surrogates, and his campaign have abandoned the norms of civilized democratic competition and gone completely, gleefully rogue.**If we don’t keep Trump out of the White House, everything we care about -- diversity, inclusion, acceptance -- will go up in smoke. Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:name@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**Official Statement of Phil Scott on the State’s Revenue Forecast and Need for More Responsible Budgeting**
Montpelier, Vt. – Phil Scott today issued the following statement on the Shumlin Administration’s updated revenue forecast and changing the way state government builds its budgets:

“The revenue forecast released today by the Shumlin Administration is unwelcome news, but not unexpected. The fact is, Legislators passed the FY17 budget in May knowing full well there would be a deficit, even after raising $47 million in new taxes and fees.

“This repeated pattern of spending more than Vermonters can afford, raising taxes and acting surprised when we are faced with shortfalls year after year is a clear sign that Vermont’s system of budgeting is broken.

“In reality, the state’s revenue projections are hypotheticals. They are based on the best guess of the state’s economists. Instead of building budgets based on hypothetical, frequently inaccurate projections, we need to build state budgets off clear, verifiable economic data.

“That is why as Governor I will never propose, nor will I sign, a budget that grows faster than the underlying economy or wages in the previous year. Benchmarking our budgets to the previous years economic performance is the best way to ensure state government is helping Vermonters get ahead and keep more of what they earn, instead of taking more of what they are expected to earn.

“State government must also tighten its belt, modernize and where necessary restructure to provide better service at lower costs. Montpelier pays far too much attention to how to take in revenue in the form of taxes and fees and far too little to how to spend less and do more.

“Every single day, Vermonters make choices about how they spend their money – spending based on what they have, not what they think they might have; finding ways to save; and prioritizing what they ‘need’ vs. what they ‘want.’ It’s long past time for Montpelier to take the same approach.”

**Listen, Learn, Lead: Meet Phil Scott**

Lieutenant Governor Phil Scott has been a consistent voice of reason and common sense in Montpelier. As the only Republican elected to statewide office, Phil has shown determination and leadership in advocating for Vermonters and promoting policies and programs that benefit Vermont families and the economy. Read about Phil Scott’s plans at www.philscott.org ###
